    ✦

    More of my work

    A handful of other projects I've built — mostly interactive, all hosted at bergerzvika.github.io.

    ∀∃

    Automated Reasoning · Course

    Interactive course materials on automated reasoning — SAT/SMT solvers, decision procedures, and proof generation, with step-by-step walkthroughs.

    Open ↗
    ⬣

    PBV Visual My thesis

    My M.Sc. thesis work — a visual playground for Parametric Bit-Vectors (PBV). Watch bit-width parameters propagate through SMT operations and rewrite rules in real time, and see how the underlying decision procedure reasons about them.

    Open ↗
    ◊

    MDP Tutorial · AI Lab

    Step-by-step tutorial on Markov Decision Processes — value iteration, policy iteration, and the Bellman equations, animated on a grid-world.

    Open ↗
    ⚠

    Prompt Injection

    A showcase of prompt-injection attacks against LLMs — concrete examples, categories, and notes on mitigation patterns.

    Open ↗
    🩺

    Nurse Scheduling · Visualization Lab

    Interactive visualization lab for the Nurse Scheduling Problem — explore constraints, shift assignments, and how solvers build a feasible roster step by step.

    Open ↗
    Made by Zvika Berger · zvbe10@gmail.com
